---
title: "Project Status"
---

::: {.callout-note}
Generated by `scripts/generate-project-status.py` on 2026-06-28T10:13:59.344603.
:::

## Current milestone

pre-v1-corpus-expansion-window

## Case status

| Case | Status | Current stage | Model reliability | Human reliability | Manifest docs | Raw | Text | Segmented | MIPVU | Annotated | Concordance | Analysis |
|---|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|
| `am-rev` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 11 | 11 | 11 | 11 | 11 | 4 | complete | complete |
| `fr-rev` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 2 | 2 | 2 | 2 | 2 | 2 | complete | complete |
| `hitler` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | 8 | complete | complete |
| `lincoln` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | complete | designed | 5 | 5 | 5 | 5 | 5 | 5 | complete | complete |
| `napoleon` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 11 | 11 | 11 | 11 | 11 | 9 | complete | complete |
| `wwi-britain` | mipvu-review-complete-codex-assisted | mipvu-review-complete | absent | absent | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | 4 | complete | complete |
| `x-case` | comparative-protocol-draft | comparative-guardrails-defined | not-applicable | not-applicable |  |  |  |  |  |  | draft | comparative-protocol-draft |

## Model-reliability warnings

- `am-rev` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `fr-rev` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `hitler` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/annotated/lincoln-gettysburg-address_annotated.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/annotated/lincoln-lyceum-address_annotated.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/annotated/lincoln-second-inaugural_annotated.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/mipvu/lincoln-gettysburg-address_mipvu.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/mipvu/lincoln-lyceum-address_mipvu.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/mipvu/lincoln-second-inaugural_mipvu.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/segmented/lincoln-gettysburg-address.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/segmented/lincoln-lyceum-address.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/corpus/segmented/lincoln-second-inaugural.json: packet source input hash predates annotation-forward corpus refresh; existing packet remains historical and requires reliability resampling before promotion.
- `lincoln` (complete): /Users/andrewhammer/codegarden/koenigsberg-sacrifice-workbench/cases/lincoln/metadata/document-manifest.json: packet document manifest hash predates expanded corpus; existing packet remains scoped to unchanged sampled inputs.
- `napoleon` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `wwi-britain` (absent): Multi-model reliability has not been designed for this case.

## Human-reliability warnings

- `am-rev` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `fr-rev` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `hitler` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `lincoln` (designed): Human reliability cohorts are designed; required primary coder submissions are not complete.
- `napoleon` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.
- `wwi-britain` (absent): Human reliability has not been designed for this case.

## Notes

The original historical case corpora are no longer unchanged from the first v1 working set: #180 added targeted American Revolution, Lincoln, and Napoleon documents, and the pre-v1 expansion window also added fr-rev and wwi-britain as draft expansion corpora. #181 has now run the expanded material through first-pass Codex-assisted MIPVU review, CMT/Koenigsberg annotation where supported, concordance, case analysis, cross-case synthesis, validation, and traceability regeneration. These annotation-forward artifacts remain provisional until independent human review. Lincoln retains historical model-reliability artifacts for the prior three-document core and designed human-reliability cohorts, but required human coder submissions are not complete and the expanded Lincoln corpus still needs reliability resampling before promotion. American Revolution, Napoleon, Hitler, fr-rev, and wwi-britain model and human reliability workflows remain absent or incomplete for publication-grade promotion. Expansion work is tracked in GitHub milestone 7 and issue #174; remaining work should freeze the expanded corpus boundary and update reliability sampling before claim promotion resumes.
